docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74607891) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO GIANTS BASEBALL CLUB LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HERITAGE DISTILLING COMPANY NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-26-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-25-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-03-2025

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (1ST APPEARANCE FEE FOR DEFENDANT HERITAGE DISTILLING COMPANY) (TRANSACTION ID # 74634978) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO GIANTS BASEBALL CLUB LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT HERITAGE DISTILLING COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-26-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
